zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Christopher More於1474年5月出生在英國素瑞時，他的父親Sir John More21歲，母親Elizabeth Livedon20歲。他於1503年與Lady Margaret Mugge在英國英格蘭波克夏格亞特 可維爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1505年在英國英格蘭被列為occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547.。他去世於1549年8月16日在英國英格蘭素瑞享年75歲，埋葬在英國素瑞吉爾德福德聖 尼可拉希也 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Christopher More于1474年5月出生在英国素瑞时，他的父亲Sir John More21岁，母亲Elizabeth Livedon20岁。他于1503年与Lady Margaret Mugge在英国英格兰波克夏格亞特 可維爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1505年在英国英格兰被列为occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547.。他去世于1549年8月16日在英国英格兰素瑞享年75岁，埋葬在英国素瑞吉爾德福德聖 尼可拉希也 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: More
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: nickname for a dark-skinned man, from a diminutive of Old French more ‘Moor’ (see More ).

nameMeanings.name: Sir
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: George
meanings: Via Old French and Latin, from Greek Georgios (a derivative of geōrgos ‘farmer’, from gē ‘earth’ + ergein ‘to work’). This was the name of several early saints, including the shadowy figure who is now the patron of England (as well as of Germany and Portugal). If the saint existed at all, he was perhaps martyred in Palestine in the persecutions of Christians instigated by the Emperor Diocletian at the beginning of the 4th century. The popular legend in which the hero slays a dragon is a medieval Italian invention. He was for a long time a more important saint in the Orthodox Church than in the West, and the name was not much used in England during the Middle Ages, even after St George came to be regarded as the patron of England in the 14th century. Its use increased from the 1400s, and by 1500 it was regularly among the most popular male names. This popularity was reinforced when George I came to the throne in 1714 , bringing this name with him from Germany. It has been one of the most popular English boys' names ever since.

nameMeanings.name: Christopher
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Khristophoros, from Khristos ‘Christ’ + pherein ‘to bear’. This was popular among early Christians, conscious of the fact that they were metaphorically bearing Christ in their hearts. A later, over-literal interpretation of the name gave rise to the legend of a saint who actually bore the Christ-child over a stream; he is regarded as the patron of travellers. In England the name was uncommon in the Middle Ages, but became very popular in the 16th century, especially in parts of the North.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Christopher More was born in May 1474, in Surrey, England, his father, Sir John More, was 21 and his mother, Elizabeth Livedon, was 20. He married Lady Margaret Mugge in 1503, in Great Coxwell, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. In 1505, his occupation is listed as occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. in England, United Kingdom. He died on 16 August 1549, in Surrey, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 75, and was buried in St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, England.

fr.Guildford Saint Nicolas, Guildford, Surr: St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Christopher More est né en mai 1474, à Surrey, Angleterre, son père, Sir John More, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Livedon, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Lady Margaret Mugge en 1503, à Great Coxwell, Berkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. En 1505, sa profession de son indiquée est occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 16 août 1549, à Surrey, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 75 ans, et a été enterré à St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Christopher More im Mai 1474 in Surrey, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John More 21 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Livedon 20. Er hat 1503 in Great Coxwell, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom Lady Margaret Mugge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. 1505 ist sein Beruf als occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. in England, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 16. August 1549 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Surrey, England, United Kingdom und wurde in St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher More è nato il nel maggio 1474 nel Surrey, England, il suo padre, Sir John More, aveva 21 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Livedon, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Lady Margaret Mugge nel 1503, nel Great Coxwell, Berkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Nel 1505, la sua occupazione è indicata come occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Morì il 16 agosto 1549, nel Surrey, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 75 anni, e fu sepolto a St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher Moreが1474年5月にイギリススリーで生まれた時，父Sir John Moreは21歳，母Elizabeth Livedonは20歳であった。1503年にイギリスイギリスバークシュアイアグレアト コクスウエルでLady Margaret Muggeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。1505年，イギリスイギリスでの職業はoccupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547.と記録されている。彼は1549年8月16日にイギリスイギリススリーで75歳で死去し，イギリススリーグイルドフォードスト ニコラス' チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Guildford Saint Nicolas, Guildford, Surr: 영국 수리 길드퍼드 스트 니콜라스' c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Sir Christopher More(이)가 1474년 5월 영국 수리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John More(은)는 21세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Livedon(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1503년 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 그리트 콕스웰에서 Lady Margaret Mugge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 1505년, 그의 직업은 영국 잉글랜드에서 occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547.이었다. 그는 1549년 8월 16일 영국 잉글랜드 수리에서 75세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 수리 길드퍼드 스트 니콜라스' c후르치에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Christopher More nasceu em maio de 1474, em Surrey, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John More, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Livedon, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Margaret Mugge em 1503, em Great Coxwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Em 1505, sua profissão aparece como occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. em Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 16 de agosto de 1549, em Surrey, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 75 anos, e foi sepultado em St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra.

ru.Guildford Saint Nicolas, Guildford, Surr: ст николас' чурч, гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Christopher More родился май 1474 г. в местности сурри, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John More было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Livedon, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Margaret Mugge в 1503 г. в местности грит коксвелл, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. В 1505 году он работал по профессии occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. в местности Англия, Великобритания. Он умер 16 августа 1549 г. в местности сурри, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 75 лет и был похоронен в местности ст николас' чурч, гуаилдфорд, сурри, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Christopher More nació en mayo de 1474, en Surrey, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John More, tenía 21 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Livedon, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Lady Margaret Mugge en 1503, en Great Coxwell, Berkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. En 1505, su ocupación registrada era occupation history:  offices held clerk, the exchequer by 1505, secondary in the lord treasurer’s remembrancer’s office by 1526, king’s remembrancer 1542-d.; alnager, surr. and suss. 1505-d.; under steward, manors of witley and worplesdon, surr. 1513; commr. subsidy, surr. 1515, 1523, 1524, 1536, 1547, musters 1544, benevolence 1544/45, contribution 1546, chantries, surr., suss. and southwark 1546, surr., suss. and chichester 1548; other commissions 1530-46; verderer, windsor forest by 1519; surveyor of lands to margaret, countess of salisbury 1521; j.p. surr. 1522-d., suss. 1534-d.; sheriff, surr. and suss. 1532-3, 1539-40; master of game, merrow and west clandon parks 1540; steward, manor of west horsley, surr. by 1547. en Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Murió el 16 de agosto de 1549, en Surrey, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 75 años, y fue sepultado en St Nicolas' Church, Guildford, Surrey, Inglaterra.
